texto: I was a little boy singing sad songs, about 9 or 10 years old in the woods. I listened to my voice coming back to me. It was as high as you could go. I dreamed of being famous as a singer when I was on those cotton fields. I wanted to see the world and meet people.
explicacao: Citação de Percy Sledge sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I was a little boy singing sad songs, about 9 or 10 years old in the woods. I listened to my voic…” articula motivacao, sad, world em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como world e me.
